# Multicore — Full LLM Reference

## Project Overview

Multicore is an open-source Next.js 16 dashboard and headless automation toolkit for playing
Terracore, a blockchain game on the Hive network. The app lets you track multiple Hive accounts,
perform all Terracore on-chain actions via Hive Keychain, and run fully automated background
scripts for claiming SCRAP, battling, questing, selling/buying relics, and token sweeping.

GitHub: https://github.com/rhiaji/multicore-app
Author: rhiaji (PeakD: https://peakd.com/@rhiaji)

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer          | Technology                                             |
|----------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| Framework      | Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript          |
| Styling        | Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui, tw-animate-css             |
| Blockchain UI  | Hive Keychain browser extension                        |
| Blockchain SDK | @hiveio/dhive (server-side broadcasting)               |
| Encryption     | CryptoJS AES-256 (account keys at rest)                |
| Scripts runner | tsx (TypeScript execute, no compile step)              |
| Analytics      | @vercel/analytics                                      |
| HTTP           | axios                                                  |

---

## Full File Tree

```
/
├── app/
│   ├── layout.tsx                              # Root layout, fonts, metadata
│   ├── globals.css                             # Tailwind + design tokens
│   ├── page.tsx                                # Docs / self-hosting guide (/)
│   ├── dashboard/page.tsx                      # Multi-account dashboard (/dashboard)
│   ├── market/relics/page.tsx                  # Relic marketplace (/market/relics)
│   └── scripts/
│       ├── page.tsx                            # Scripts index & launcher
│       ├── auto-claim-battle/page.tsx          # Claim & battle SSE log UI
│       ├── auto-quest/page.tsx                 # Quest automation SSE log UI
│       ├── relic-market-sell/page.tsx          # Relic sell SSE log UI
│       ├── relic-market-buy/page.tsx           # Relic buy SSE log UI
│       └── token-transfer/page.tsx             # Token transfer SSE log UI
│
├── app/api/scripts/
│   ├── auto-claim-battle/route.ts              # POST → SSE stream (claim & battle)
│   ├── auto-quest/route.ts                     # POST → SSE stream (quest)
│   ├── relic-market-sell/route.ts              # POST → SSE stream (sell)
│   ├── relic-market-buy/route.ts               # POST → SSE stream (buy)
│   └── token-transfer/route.ts                 # POST → SSE stream (transfer)
│
├── components/
│   ├── dashboard.tsx                           # Root multi-account dashboard
│   ├── account-card.tsx                        # Per-account stats, actions, relics
│   ├── active-quest-card.tsx                   # In-progress quest progress card
│   ├── quest-card.tsx                          # Quest board slot
│   ├── quest-detail-modal.tsx                  # Quest requirements + start/collect
│   ├── quest-history-modal.tsx                 # Per-account quest history log
│   ├── battle-modal.tsx                        # Manual battle target selection
│   ├── upgrade-stat-modal.tsx                  # Upgrade DMG / DEF / ENG
│   ├── stake-scrap-modal.tsx                   # Stake SCRAP via Hive Engine
│   ├── contribute-favor-modal.tsx              # Burn SCRAP for Favor
│   ├── send-hive-modal.tsx                     # HIVE transfer via Keychain
│   ├── sell-relic-modal.tsx                    # List single relic type
│   ├── sell-all-relics-modal.tsx               # Batch list all relic types
│   ├── delegate-rc-modal.tsx                   # RC delegation via Keychain
│   ├── rc-overview-panel.tsx                   # Batch RC fetch for all accounts
│   ├── add-account.tsx                         # Add a tracked account
│   ├── configure-accounts-modal.tsx            # Encrypt accounts for scripts
│   └── market/
│       ├── relics-market.tsx                   # Marketplace browser
│       ├── buy-relic-modal.tsx                 # Buy single listing
│       ├── mass-buy-relics-modal.tsx           # Sweep tracked-account listings
│       ├── relics-market-logs.tsx              # Market activity log
│       ├── user-market-logs.tsx                # Per-user market log
│       ├── hive-login-button.tsx               # Keychain login button
│       └── hive-login-nav.tsx                  # Nav-bar login widget
│
├── lib/
│   ├── types.ts                                # Canonical domain types
│   ├── hive-auth.ts                            # Keychain login / session
│   ├── encryption.ts                           # AES-256 encrypt/decrypt
│   ├── quest-utils.ts                          # Quest tier/stat requirements
│   ├── utils.ts                                # Tailwind cn() helper
│   ├── events/                                 # Browser Keychain wrappers
│   │   ├── battle/action.ts                    # terracore_battle
│   │   ├── buy-relic/action.ts                 # Transfer to terracore.market
│   │   ├── claim-scrap/action.ts               # terracore_claim
│   │   ├── contribute-favor/action.ts          # Burn SCRAP for Favor
│   │   ├── delegate-rc/action.ts               # RC delegation
│   │   ├── delegation-stats/action.ts          # Fetch VESTS in/out
│   │   ├── mass-buy-relics/action.ts           # Batch purchase broadcast
│   │   ├── quest-collect/action.ts             # terracore_quest_collect
│   │   ├── quest-start/action.ts               # SCRAP burn to start quest
│   │   ├── sell-all-relics/action.ts           # Batch tm_create
│   │   ├── sell-relic/action.ts                # Single tm_create
│   │   ├── stake-scrap/action.ts               # SCRAP stake (HE)
│   │   ├── transfer-hive/action.ts             # requestTransfer HIVE
│   │   └── upgrade-stat/action.ts              # Burn SCRAP to upgrade stat
│   ├── server-events/                          # Server-side SSE generators
│   │   ├── auto-claim-battle/action.ts         # runAutoClaimBattle()
│   │   ├── auto-quest/action.ts                # runAutoQuest()
│   │   ├── relic-market-buy/action.ts          # runRelicMarketBuy()
│   │   ├── relic-market-sell/action.ts         # runRelicMarketSell()
│   │   └── transfer/action.ts                  # runTransfer()
│   └── shared/
│       ├── hive-nodes.ts                       # Hive RPC node list
│       ├── hive-client.ts                      # dhive client factory
│       ├── api/terracore.ts                    # Terracore REST API fetchers
│       └── events/types.ts                     # Typed SSE event unions
│
└── server/
    ├── automation/
    │   ├── auto-claim-battle/
    │   │   ├── index.ts                        # Entry point (loop)
    │   │   └── config/settings.ts              # Bot behaviour settings
    │   ├── auto-quest/
    │   │   ├── index.ts
    │   │   └── config/settings.ts
    │   ├── auto-token-transfer/
    │   │   ├── index.ts
    │   │   ├── config/settings.ts
    │   │   └── config/env.ts                   # Runtime env var overrides
    │   ├── auto-relic-market/
    │   │   ├── index.ts
    │   │   ├── config/settings.ts
    │   │   └── config/env.ts
    │   └── terracore/
    │       ├── index.ts                        # Combined loop (recommended)
    │       ├── config/settings.ts
    │       └── config/env.ts
    └── scripts/                                # One-off helper scripts (not loops)
```

---

## Environment Variables

Copy `.env.example` to `.env` and fill in before running any automation.

```env
# Required for all automations
TERRACORE_ACCOUNTS_ENC       # AES-encrypted account list (from dashboard Encrypt tool)
TERRACORE_ENCRYPTION_KEY     # 64-char hex key matching the encrypted config
TERRACORE_ACCOUNT_MAIN       # Main / receiver account username (no @ sign)
POLL_INTERVAL                # Loop interval ms (default: 60000)

# Runtime overrides for auto-token-transfer only
TOKEN_SYMBOL                 # Override settings.tokenSymbol
SEND_MAX_BALANCE             # true|false — override settings.sendMaxBalance
CUSTOM_AMOUNT                # Override settings.customAmount
RUN_ONCE                     # true — run one pass and exit (useful for cron)
```

---

## Automation Scripts Reference

### pnpm auto:claim-battle
File: server/automation/auto-claim-battle/

Attacks available targets then claims the SCRAP mining stash for every account.
Loops continuously. Skips claim if scrap balance is below threshold (configurable).

Settings (server/automation/auto-claim-battle/config/settings.ts):

```ts
scrapRequirement: {
  enabled:    true,   // Skip claim if SCRAP < minerate × multiplier
  multiplier: 4,      // How many cycles of mining to accumulate first
}
manualClaim: {
  enabled: false,     // true = always claim regardless of balance
}
attacks: {
  enabled:         true,
  minimumRequired: 2,     // Need at least this many available attacks to proceed
}
transfer: {
  enabled:        false,  // Sweep SCRAP to TERRACORE_ACCOUNT_MAIN after claim
  scrapAllowance: 200,    // SCRAP to leave in each sub-account
  memo:           "terracore auto-transfer",
}
delays: {
  betweenAttacks:   1500,   // ms between each attack broadcast
  betweenAccounts:  2000,   // ms between accounts
  betweenLoops:     5000,   // ms between full loop cycles
  retryDelay:       1500,   // ms before retry (× attempt number)
  claimPropagation: 3000,   // ms after claim before reading HE balance
}
```

NOTE: Boss fights are NOT automated. Only standard player-vs-player battles.

---

### pnpm auto:quest
File: server/automation/auto-quest/

Collects completed quests and starts new available quests for every account.
Quest collect uses posting key. Quest start uses active key (SCRAP burn).

Settings (server/automation/auto-quest/config/settings.ts):

```ts
quests: {
  maxStartsPerCycle: 3,  // Board slots to start per account per cycle (1–3)
}
delays: {
  betweenActions:  1500,
  betweenAccounts: 2000,
  betweenLoops:    5000,
  retryDelay:      1500,
}
retry: {
  maxAttempts: 3,
}
```

---

### pnpm auto:token-transfer
File: server/automation/auto-token-transfer/

Sweeps a token balance from every sub-account to TERRACORE_ACCOUNT_MAIN.
Supports HIVE, HBD (native), and any Hive Engine token (e.g. SCRAP).

Settings (server/automation/auto-token-transfer/config/settings.ts):

```ts
tokenSymbol:    "HIVE",  // Token to sweep — HIVE/HBD or HE symbol like SCRAP
sendMaxBalance: true,    // true = full balance minus allowance
customAmount:   0,       // Fixed amount when sendMaxBalance is false
allowance:      0,       // Leave this much behind when sweeping
memo:           "Multicore bot token transfer consolidation",
delays: {
  betweenTransfers: 1500,
  betweenAccounts:  2000,
  betweenLoops:     60000,
  retryDelay:       1500,
}
retry: { maxAttempts: 3 }
runOnce: false,          // true = exit after one pass (cron-friendly)
```

Runtime env overrides: TOKEN_SYMBOL, SEND_MAX_BALANCE, CUSTOM_AMOUNT, RUN_ONCE

---

### pnpm auto:relic-market
File: server/automation/auto-relic-market/

Sub-accounts list their relics on the Terracore marketplace.
Then TERRACORE_ACCOUNT_MAIN buys them back.
Sell uses active key (tm_create). Buy uses active key (transfer to terracore.market).

Settings (server/automation/auto-relic-market/config/settings.ts):

```ts
sell: {
  pricingMode: "auto",  // "auto" = undercut floor | "fixed" = flat per-rarity
  autoFloor:   0.1,     // Minimum listing total in HIVE (marketplace minimum)
  fixedPrices: {        // Used only when pricingMode is "fixed"
    common_relics:    0.001,
    uncommon_relics:  0.001,
    rare_relics:      0.001,
    epic_relics:      0.001,
    legendary_relics: 0.001,
  },
}
buy: {
  batchTrigger:    25,    // Cached listings that trigger early buy phase
  triggerDelay:    5000,  // ms to wait before fetching live market after trigger
  batchSize:       25,    // Max ops per Hive broadcast tx (keep ≤ 25)
  rarityFilter:    null,  // e.g. ["rare_relics","epic_relics"] or null for all
  maxPricePerUnit: null,  // Skip listings above this HIVE/unit; null = no limit
}
delays: {
  betweenAccounts: 1500,
  betweenBatches:  1500,
  betweenLoops:    5000,
  retryDelay:      1500,
}
retry: { maxAttempts: 4 }
```

---

### pnpm auto:terracore  (recommended)
File: server/automation/terracore/

Combined loop: claim + battle + quest + SCRAP transfer in one continuous process.
This is the recommended single command for fully hands-off Terracore operation.
Boss fights and stat upgrades are NOT part of this loop.

Settings (server/automation/terracore/config/settings.ts):

```ts
scrapRequirement: { enabled: true, multiplier: 4 }
manualClaim:      { enabled: false }
attacks:          { enabled: true, minimumRequired: 2 }
quests:           { maxStartsPerCycle: 3 }
transfer: {
  enabled:        true,   // Sweep SCRAP after each claim (on by default here)
  scrapAllowance: 200,
  memo:           "Multicore Bot consolidation",
}
delays: {
  betweenAttacks:   1500,
  betweenActions:   1500,  // Between quest collect/start broadcasts
  betweenAccounts:  2000,
  betweenLoops:     5000,
  retryDelay:       1500,
  claimPropagation: 3000,
}
retry: { maxAttempts: 3 }
```

---

## Account Encryption Flow

Private keys are never stored in plaintext. They are encrypted client-side in the
browser before being placed in environment variables.

1. Dashboard → Switch → Export Config  →  JSON template with empty key fields
2. Paste template into editor, fill active_key and posting_key from Hive wallet
3. Dashboard → Scripts → Encrypt Accounts  →  produces ENCRYPTION_KEY + encrypted blob
4. Set TERRACORE_ENCRYPTION_KEY and TERRACORE_ACCOUNTS_ENC in .env
5. Run any automation script — keys are decrypted in-memory only during execution

Implementation: lib/encryption.ts (CryptoJS AES-256)
- generateEncryptionKey()            → 32-byte random hex key
- encryptAccounts(accounts, key)     → EncryptedConfig
- decryptAccounts(config, key)       → AccountWithKeys[]

---

## Hive Blockchain Action Reference

### Keychain calls (browser UI)

| Action               | Keychain method        | custom_json id / target  | Key required |
|----------------------|------------------------|--------------------------|--------------|
| Claim SCRAP          | requestCustomJson      | terracore_claim          | Posting      |
| Battle               | requestCustomJson      | terracore_battle         | Posting      |
| Quest collect        | requestCustomJson      | terracore_quest_collect  | Posting      |
| Delegate RC          | requestCustomJson      | rc                       | Posting      |
| Upgrade stat         | requestCustomJson      | ssc-mainnet-hive         | Active       |
| Stake SCRAP          | requestCustomJson      | ssc-mainnet-hive         | Active       |
| Burn SCRAP (Favor)   | requestCustomJson      | ssc-mainnet-hive         | Active       |
| Start quest          | requestCustomJson      | ssc-mainnet-hive         | Active       |
| Sell relic (single)  | requestCustomJson      | ssc-mainnet-hive tm_create | Active     |
| Sell all relics      | requestBroadcast       | ssc-mainnet-hive tm_create | Active     |
| Buy relic            | requestTransfer        | terracore.market         | Active       |
| Mass-buy relics      | requestBroadcast       | transfers to terracore.market | Active  |
| Send HIVE            | requestTransfer        | recipient                | Active       |

### Stat upgrade memo format

```
terracore_damage-<random_hash>
terracore_defense-<random_hash>
terracore_engineering-<random_hash>
```

### Stat upgrade cost formula

```
cost (SCRAP) = currentLevel²
currentLevel (damage)      = floor(player.damage / 10)
currentLevel (defense)     = floor(player.defense / 10)
currentLevel (engineering) = player.engineering
```

---

## Terracore REST API

All game data comes from the Terracore REST API. Fetchers: lib/shared/api/terracore.ts

| Function                      | Endpoint                          | Returns          |
|-------------------------------|-----------------------------------|------------------|
| fetchPlayer(username)         | /player/:username                 | PlayerData       |
| fetchPlayerRelics(username)   | /items/:username                  | UserRelic[]      |
| fetchQuestBoard(username)     | /quest_board?username=            | QuestBoard       |
| fetchActiveQuests(username)   | /quests/:username                 | ActiveQuest[]    |
| fetchBattleTargets(maxDef)    | /battle?maxDefense=               | BattleTarget[]   |

fetchPlayer retries up to 5× on HTTP 429 (rate limit).

---

## Quest System

Five quest types, each with tiers 1–5.

| Type    | Primary stat   | Secondary | Required item |
|---------|----------------|-----------|---------------|
| COMBAT  | DMG            | CRIT      | Weapon        |
| SALVAGE | ENG            | —         | Tool          |
| STEALTH | DODGE (items)  | LUCK      | Armor         |
| FORTUNE | LUCK (items)   | CRIT      | Avatar        |
| DEFENSE | DEF            | —         | Ship          |

| Tier | Min level | Min stat | Item required |
|------|-----------|----------|---------------|
| 1    | 1         | 10       | No            |
| 2    | 10        | 50       | No            |
| 3    | 25        | 100      | Yes           |
| 4    | 50        | 200      | Yes           |
| 5    | 100       | 500      | Yes           |

---

## What is NOT Automated

The following Terracore actions exist in the dashboard UI but are NOT part of any
automation script or loop:

- Boss fights
- Stat upgrades (DMG / DEF / ENG)
- SCRAP staking
- Burning SCRAP for Favor
- RC delegation
- Sending HIVE
- Manually buying relics from the marketplace

---

## Common Errors

| Error                                  | Cause / Fix                                                                 |
|----------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Failed to decrypt TERRACORE_ACCOUNTS_ENC | Key mismatch or whitespace. Re-copy both values from the Encrypt tool.    |
| Keychain not found                     | Install + unlock Hive Keychain browser extension.                           |
| RC errors on broadcast                 | Account low on Resource Credits. Use RC delegation or wait for recharge.    |
| Script shows stale / wrong accounts    | Re-encrypt with the current account list and update .env.                   |
| Stat upgrade wrong action              | Check lib/events/upgrade-stat/action.ts memo prefix matches the stat.       |
